name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 11 Apr 2022
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release includes several new improvements to the Drag-and-Drop content editor – all designed to improve your text editing experience."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For details, please read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Improvements in Drag-and-Drop Content Editor","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Drag-and-Drop content editor has been enhanced to provide you with better control in styling your content. To learn about how to create content using the Drag-and-Drop content editor, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Drag-and-Drop-Editor-Content-Tab","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Drag and Drop Editor: Content Tab"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The notable changes include:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"New content blocks – PARAGRAPH and LIST – have been introduced to replace the TEXT content block. The new content blocks provide better control of how text appears including:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Font-weight control"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Line height and letter spacing control"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"More list styles"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Better control for list spacing and indentation "}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ParagraphandListContentBlocks.0685g000006x8ZxAAI.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ParagraphandListContentBlocks.0685g000006x8ZxAAI.png","name":"Paragraph and List Content Blocks","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1394,"width":2558}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Separation of content formatting and character formatting."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The content formatting (such as font family, font size, text alignment, and so on) is available on the Content Properties panel."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The character formatting (such as options for bold, underline, font color, and so on) is available in form of a Text Toolbar that appears when you select a text snippet. The position of the selected text snippet determines the options shown on the toolbar. Apart from formatting options, the toolbar also includes options to insert hyperlinks, tags, special characters, and so on."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/FormattingOptions.0685g000006x8a7AAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/FormattingOptions.0685g000006x8a7AAA.png","name":"Formatting Options","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1394,"width":2558}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]}]
